title: rubus bailletianus
intro: Rubus bailletianus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Raspberry Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Rubus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus bailletianus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and it is also used as a food source, with its fruits being edible and rich in vitamins and minerals.
